mapper.sql: id, permission_code, permission_name, permission_type, parent_id, path, method, sort, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_permission WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_permission WHERE permission_code = #{permissionCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_permission ( permission_code, permission_name, permission_type, parent_id, path, method, sort, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{permissionCode}, #{permissionName}, #{permissionType}, #{parentId}, #{path}, #{method}, #{sort}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_permission SET permission_name = #{permissionName}, permission_type = #{permissionType}, parent_id = #{parentId}, path = #{path}, method = #{method}, sort = #{sort}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_permission SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_permission WHERE deleted = 0
AND (permission_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR permission_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted = 0 AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1

SELECT permission_code FROM sys_permission WHERE deleted = 0
AND id IN
#{id}
AND 1 = 2
